Petra Anna Antal
N° 01 — The Story So FarA Little About Me

My mentor once told me the real knowledge wasn't in the textbooks — it was in how we used it to shake things up.

I've always viewed marketing as the ultimate space for creative freedom. Instead of following safe, generic formulas, I push to think outside the box — blending visual branding, public strategy, and digital communication into campaigns that actually stand out.

Being recognized as a "Young Rising Talent" only fueled that fire. I'm here to bring precision to imagination — a strategist's discipline paired with a designer's eye — and to build work that honors heritage while still standing out.

Young Rising Talent, 2025

Selected Case Studies

Creativity meets intention.

Case Study N° 01 — Brand Redesign

Red Bull Élite

FMCG · Motorsport Lifestyle

Constraint

F1 has evolved into a luxury lifestyle sport, but Red Bull's bright blue-and-silver can design clashes with the upscale, high-society world of the paddock elite.

Solution

A paddock-exclusive premium line — "Red Bull Élite" — in a deep navy mockup with a refined, minimalist gold bull logo.

“Power, refined. The new paddock standard.”

Case Study N° 02 — Product Launch

The Napa Valley Escape

Luxury · Fashion

Overview

A limited-edition fall knitwear travel capsule collection, inspired by the cinematic heritage of The Parent Trap.

Target Audience

The high-net-worth experiential traveller who values nostalgia, quiet luxury, and an exclusive lifestyle.

“The art of travel, the taste of luxury.”

Case Study N° 03 — Fixing a Flop

Jaguar: Shadows of Heritage

Automotive · Rebrand Recovery

Problem

Jaguar's controversial rebrand leaned into extreme artistic expression but lacked product placement, leaving automotive enthusiasts feeling disconnected.

Pivot Strategy

High-fashion ambassadors shot in avant-garde outfits, their shadows cast as the unmistakable silhouettes of Jaguar's new electric supercars — later revealed alongside the actual car each ambassador represents.

Brand Redesign

Red Bull Élite

Audit

Bright blue and silver design clashes with the upscale, high-society lifestyle of the F1 paddock elite.

Solution

A paddock-exclusive premium line, "Red Bull Élite," in a deep navy mockup with a refined minimalist gold bull logo.

Content Plan

An aesthetic shot of the can aboard a yacht in Monaco during GP weekend; a cinematic transition from racetrack to black-tie after-party; an elegant driver carousel built around one minimalist hook.

Why this direction

A lighter colorway tweak would've been faster, but wouldn't fix the real problem: the audience has moved upmarket and the can hasn't. The full navy-and-gold repositioning makes the audience shift the story, not the packaging.

“Power, refined. The new paddock standard.”

Product Launch

Louis Vuitton × Staglin Family Vineyard

Overview

"The Napa Valley Escape" — a limited-edition fall knitwear travel capsule collection inspired by the cinematic heritage of The Parent Trap.

Target Audience

The high-net-worth experiential traveller, who values nostalgia, quiet luxury, and an exclusive lifestyle.

Timeline

A private, invite-only launch event at the Staglin Vineyard for VIP clients, followed by a global digital rollout and boutique placements in Aspen, St. Tropez, and Napa.

“The art of travel, the taste of luxury.”

Fixing a Flop

Jaguar: Shadows of Heritage

Overview

Rescuing Jaguar's controversial rebrand by bridging extreme artistic expression with automotive heritage.

Problem

It lacked product placement and felt completely disconnected from automotive enthusiasts.

Pivot Strategy

The "Shadows of Heritage" campaign: high-fashion creatives are shot in avant-garde outfits, but their shadows cast the unmistakable silhouettes of Jaguar's sleek new electric supercars, later combined with the actual car being represented by each ambassador.

PR & Media Outreach

A mock press release detailing the new brand ambassadors, framing the campaign as a celebration of human individuality driven by machine excellence — paired with a short pitch to Vogue Business or Business of Fashion.
